goal: Audit and harden card catalog duplicate handling so collection visibility never shows repeated card identities across active/locked views, without deleting any card assets.
constraints: Do not delete card files or media assets.
Keep runtime/battle logic unchanged; scope is catalog data shaping and validation.
Prefer minimal diffs and preserve existing source-of-truth at content/cards.
deliverables: Collection data pipeline applies defensive de-duplication for display identities.
Structure validation catches fuzzy duplicate visible identities (faction alias + normalized name).
Automated test verifies collection identity uniqueness on generated card data.
